payload.answer: Cannot execute /brain admin sql because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. Debug SQL access is disabled, so no query was run and no results are available.
citations: Input command: /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards

entity_resolution.reason: No durable memory should be created from an administrative SQL debug request.

details: Recognized an administrative SQL debug command.
Blocked execution because debug SQL is disabled by configuration.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true in a debug-safe environment, then retry the command.
Use supported non-SQL Brain inspection/admin endpoints instead of direct SQL if available.
If you only need memory contents, request them through the normal memory retrieval interface rather than admin SQL.

raw_text: {"intent":"admin_sql_debug_request","decision":"deny_execution","memory_cards":[],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"No durable memory should be created from an administrative SQL debug request."},"conflict_classification":"not_applicable","answer":"Cannot execute /brain admin sql because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. Debug SQL access is disabled, so no query was run and no results are available.","citations":["Input command: /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards","Runtime flag: BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false"],"repair_options":["Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true in a debug-safe environment, then retry the command.","Use supported non-SQL Brain inspection/admin endpoints instead of direct SQL if available.","If you only need memory contents, request them through the normal memory retrieval interface rather than admin SQL."],"receipt":{"success":false,"details":["Recognized an administrative SQL debug command.","Blocked execution because debug SQL is disabled by configuration.","No memory changes were made.","No SQL was executed."]}}
